Name: TORCH_OFF_CTRL_PARAM
Description: Defines torch extinguish behavior, including size-based effects and fade-out timing.

Fields.Name: SFX ID (Small)
Fields.Description: Visual effect ID used when a small torch is extinguished.

Fields.Name: SFX ID (Normal)
Fields.Description: Visual effect ID used when a normal-sized torch is extinguished.

Fields.Name: SFX ID (Large)
Fields.Description: Visual effect ID used when a large torch is extinguished.

Fields.Name: Fade-Out Time (Seconds)
Fields.Description: Duration of the fade-out effect when the torch is turned off.
